## Archive Complete

**Change:** compound-strength-app
**Schema:** spec-driven
**Archived to:** `openspec/changes/archive/2026-05-30-compound-strength-app/`
**Specs:** âś“ Synced â€” 13 capability specs promoted to `openspec/specs/`

All artifacts complete. All 63 tasks complete.

The 13 capabilities (`onboarding`, `exercise-catalog`, `strength-programs`, `workout-engine`, `set-logging`, `weight-selector`, `plate-calculator`, `rest-timer`, `warmup-ramp`, `progress-tracking`, `live-activity`, `data-persistence`, `settings`) now form your living spec baseline, and the full proposal/design/specs/tasks history is preserved in the archive. No active changes remain.

The implemented codebase (78 source files, 98 passing tests, clean `tsc`) is untouched by the archive â€” only the OpenSpec change tracking moved.

questions.question: 13 new capability specs would be promoted into openspec/specs/ before archiving. How do you want to handle it?

options.label: Sync now (recommended)
options.description: Create the 13 main spec files under openspec/specs/ from the deltas, then archive the change. Keeps your living spec baseline current.

options.label: Archive without syncing
options.description: Move the change to archive as-is. The delta specs stay only in the archived change; openspec/specs/ remains empty.
